news.t: Latin American Stocks Are Back on the Map. The Road Could Still Be Bumpy.

holdings.infoBox: COLO is an equity ETF with a total of 29 individual holdings. The top holdings are Grupo Cibest SA Participating Preferred stock at 14.62%, Interconexion Electrica SA ESP at 10.65%, Ecopetrol at 9.28%, Grupo Cibest at 7.13%, and Cash at 7.12%.

overview.description: The Global X MSCI Colombia ETF (COLO) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI All Colombia Select 25/50 index. The fund tracks an index of large-, mid, and small-cap Colombian companies. COLO was launched on Feb 5, 2009 and is issued by Global X.

data.title: Latin American Stocks Are Back on the Map. The Road Could Still Be Bumpy.
data.text: Investors poured twice as much into emerging markets in January as in all of 2025, betting on a weaker dollar and hedging U.S. risk.
